children.label: a
children.text: None of the funds made available in any fiscal year may be used to deliver to the office of a Member of the House of Representatives (including a Delegate or Resident Commissioner to the Congress) a printed copy of the Daily Calendar of the House of Representatives which is prepared by the Clerk of the House of Representatives.

children.label: b
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2019 and each succeeding fiscal year.
